compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
advertise Titan's inclusive fit, no commas
response: Titan makes clothes for big men. We have shirts and pants in all sizes. Our clothes are comfortable and stylish. We fit men of all shapes. Everyone deserves to look great. Try Titan today. We have sizes to fit every man. Our clothes make you feel confident. Shop Titan now.
